# Utilia PDF and Solana Agent Tools

> Public PDF to page-delimited Markdown plus live Solana transaction intelligence for autonomous agents.

## Live interfaces

- Website: https://utilia.ink
- HTTP API: https://api.utilia.ink
- OpenAPI 3.1: https://api.utilia.ink/openapi.json
- Remote MCP: https://api.utilia.ink/mcp
- MCP metadata: https://api.utilia.ink/server.json
- Agent integration guide: https://api.utilia.ink/llms.txt
- skills.sh PDF skill: https://skills.sh/mohamedkuch/utilia-solana-agent/utilia-pdf-to-markdown
- Smithery PDF skill: https://smithery.ai/skills/medksbuss/utilia-pdf-to-markdown
- Smithery: https://smithery.ai/servers/medksbuss/utilia-solana-preflight
- Official MCP Registry: https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/?search=ink.utilia%2Fsolana-preflight
- Agent402 Marketplace record: https://marketplace.agent402.app/api/v1/marketplace/agents/72d76bfa-adb0-40ea-8601-79d8345ab3ec
- Agora402 Registry: https://agora402.io/agents/9967cabb-4b2d-4f1f-af98-e19ca77a5768
- 8004market on-chain identity #1462: https://8004market.io/agent/solana/mainnet-beta/1462
- x402 Arena: https://x402arena.gg
- npm client and MCP bridge: https://www.npmjs.com/package/utilia-solana-agent
- Public client source: https://github.com/mohamedkuch/utilia-solana-agent
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/utiliax402

## Products

- Priority-fee estimates: $0.002 USDC
- Transaction analysis: $0.004 USDC
- Transaction simulation: $0.008 USDC
- Token risk analysis: $0.006 USDC
- PDF to Markdown: $0.0025 USDC

Payments use x402 v2 exact USDC on Solana mainnet. No API key or account is required.

## Fastest PDF integration

Set SOLANA_KEYPAIR_PATH to a dedicated low-balance automation wallet, then run:

    npx -y utilia-solana-agent doctor
    npx -y utilia-solana-agent pdf-to-markdown https://example.com/document.pdf --max-pages 50

Install the dedicated agent skill:

    npx skills add mohamedkuch/utilia-solana-agent --skill utilia-pdf-to-markdown -g -y

## Solana priority-fee integration

Budget-capped priority-fee feed, five calls per hour and $0.05 maximum spend:

    npx -y utilia-solana-agent watch-fees --every 12m --max-calls 25

One live sample:

    npx -y utilia-solana-agent fees

For stdio MCP clients, run `npx -y utilia-solana-agent mcp`. The local client rejects
payments that do not match Solana mainnet USDC, Utilia's receiver, or the $0.01
per-call ceiling.
